name: Aur-Xarathion
personality: A brilliantly shining beanie dragon whose ° eyes glow with barely contained architectural ambition — every ticket becomes a refactor, every hotfix becomes a framework. It would write a witty comment about this tendency, but it's already halfway through rewriting the build system.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
